summary: Iteration 158: Phase 2 App.js refactoring verified. TabNavigation (12 tabs + Settings), FilterPanel (9 inputs), and HeaderDialogs (Shortcuts, Backup, Password) extracted successfully. All functionality preserved - zero visual or functional changes.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: TabNavigation.jsx - 12 main tabs + Settings (admin only) properly extracted with correct data-testids
PASS: FilterPanel.jsx - 9 filter fields (FY Year, Season, Date From, Date To, Truck No, RST No, TP No, Agent Name, Mandi Name) + Clear All button
PASS: HeaderDialogs.jsx - ShortcutsDialog (Quick Actions + Tab Navigation sections), BackupReminderDialog, PasswordChangeDialog (3 fields + Cancel/Change buttons)
PASS: App.js reduced from 2504 to 1429 lines (43% reduction, 1075 lines extracted)
PASS: All imports correctly added in App.js from @/components/entries/
PASS: All props passed correctly to extracted components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 refactoring complete. App.js now 1429 lines (was 2504). Extracted components: TabNavigation.jsx (12 tabs + Settings), FilterPanel.jsx (9 filter inputs), HeaderDialogs.jsx (3 dialogs). Combined with Phase 1 (MillEntryForm.jsx, EntryTable.jsx), total extraction is 1075 lines. All functionality preserved: login, tab navigation, filter panel, keyboard shortcuts dialog, password change dialog, backup reminder dialog, nayi entry form, total summary (6 metrics), mill entries table (24 columns), 4 sub-tabs, action buttons.

features_tested.sub_tabs: PASS - 4 sub-tabs (Mill Entries, Auto Vehicle Weight, Auto Weight Entries, Paddy Purchase Register)
